subcodes.first_line: We make mention of him who hath been attracted by Our Call when it was raised from the summit of transcendent glory
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر من انجذب من الندآء اذ ارتفع من الافق الاعلی و اقبل الی الله رب
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @call to action, @suffering and imprisonment
